speaker: Motherly Voice
text: Alright you two, dinner is on the table! Come sit down before it gets cold.

speaker: Toddler Boy
text: Mama! Mama! I drawed a dinosaur today at school!

speaker: Motherly Voice
text: You drew a dinosaur? I can't wait to see it. Sit up properly in your chair first, okay?

speaker: Toddler Girl
text: I drawed one too! Mine is pinker.

speaker: Motherly Voice
text: A pink dinosaur — how beautiful. Now both of you, eat your vegetables before anything else.

speaker: Motherly Voice
text: I know you don't like it, but it makes you big and strong. Three bites, that's the deal.

speaker: Toddler Girl
text: I like broccoli! It looks like tiny trees.

speaker: Toddler Boy
text: It does look like trees... okay. One two free!

speaker: Motherly Voice
text: Good job, sweetheart. See? That wasn't so bad.

speaker: Toddler Boy
text: Can I have ice cream after?

speaker: Motherly Voice
text: Finish your whole plate and we'll talk about it.

speaker: Toddler Girl
text: I'm gonna finish first! I'm gonna get two ice creams!

speaker: Motherly Voice
text: One ice cream each. Now eat, both of you.
